title: Huge Items
description: Makes items very big. You'll never lose your items again.
body:
### Items become very big. 
I can say from experience that this is very good for morally unacceptable chicken farms!

Have fun!

![Chicken next to its egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6969096632409b11adf42d4792bf4cb06587f6b.png)
(Don't ask how that egg came out of that chicken)

Original Texture Pack (inspiration): "Giant Items" by _InfinitySwordofDiamond_ on CurseForge.
